description: Visual drag-and-drop calendar for daily and weekly schedule notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: seonggoos
manifest.description: Visual drag-and-drop calendar for daily and weekly schedule notes.
manifest.name: Schedule Calendar

name: Schedule Calendar

releases.author: seonggoos
releases.description:
## What's new in 1.1.0

### Added
- **Drag tooltip** — floating `HH:MM – HH:MM` label follows the cursor during any drag or resize
- **Undo** (`Cmd/Ctrl+Z`) — reverts the last change (drag, resize, edit, delete, add), up to 20 steps
- **Tag colors** — events with `#tag` in their title get a unique accent color; monthly chips reflect the same colors
- **Daily stats bar** — total scheduled time + per-tag time breakdown below the daily timeline
- **Zoom** — `−` / `+` buttons in the header scale the timeline density (0.75× / 1× / 1.5× / 2×)
- **Top resize** — drag the top edge of an event to adjust its start time (daily view)
- **Note link** (`↗`) — edit popup shows an open button when the event title contains a `[[wiki link]]`

releases.author: seonggoos
releases.description:
- Fix: replace builtin-modules with native module.builtinModules
- Fix: remove detachLeavesOfType from onunload
- Fix: use Setting.setHeading() in settings tab
- Fix: apply normalizePath() to all vault paths
- Fix: add punctuation to plugin description
- Rename: plugin ID and name to Schedule Calendar

releases.author: seonggoos
releases.description:
## Schedule Calendar v1.0.0

Visual drag-and-drop calendar for Obsidian daily notes.

### Features
- Daily / Weekly / Monthly views
- Drag events to reschedule, resize to change duration
- Click to edit event title and time
- Double-click empty area to add new event (with hover preview)
- Auto-sync changes back to note files
- Configurable schedule section name, note folder, and default event duration
